lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਸੁਖ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae sukh sabaaeaa |4|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Nanak has found total peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਜਿ ਚਿਤਵਿਆ ਸੋ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chit ji chitaviaa so mai paaeaa |
lines.english: Whatever I wish for, that I receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮਨੁ ਛੂਟਿ ਗਇਆ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: ab man chhoott geaa saadhoo sang mile |
lines.english: My mind is now emancipated; I have joined the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਰਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam leaa jotee jot rale |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I chant the Naam, and my light has merged into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿ ਭੁਜਾ ਲੀਨੇ ਦਇਆ ਕੀਨੇ ਆਪਨੇ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: geh bhujaa leene deaa keene aapane kar maaniaa |
lines.english: He has taken me by the arm, and blessed me with His kind mercy; He has accepted me His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮਿਟੇ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਬੁਝੀ ਤਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam simarat mitte kilabikh bujhee tapat aghaaniaa |
lines.english: Remembering the Lord's Name in meditation, my sins have been erased; the fire has been extinguished, and I am satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਲਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣਾ ਦੁਖ ਜਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: lai ank laae har milaae janam maranaa dukh jale |
lines.english: The Lord has hugged me in His embrace, and merged me with Himself; the pains of birth and death have been burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਇਕ ਪਲੇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak deaa dhaaree mel leene ik pale |4|2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, He has blessed me with His kind mercy; in an instant, He unites me with Himself. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਧਾਣੂ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਗਾਰਬਿ ਅਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paadhaanoo sansaar gaarab attiaa |
lines.english: The world is like a temporary way-station, but it is filled with pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੇ ਪਾਪ ਅਨੇਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੰਗ ਰਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: karate paap anek maaeaa rang rattiaa |
lines.english: People commit countless sins; they are dyed in the color of the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree chhant mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Chhant, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਿ ਬੂਡੇ ਮਰਣੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: lobh mohi abhimaan boodde maran cheet na aave |
lines.english: In greed, emotional attachment and egotism, they are drowning; they do not even think of dying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਬਿਉਹਾਰ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਏਹ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: putr mitr biauhaar banitaa eeh karat bihaave |
lines.english: Children, friends, worldly occupations and spouses - they talk of these things, while their lives are passing away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਮਿਟੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਖਟਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kirat karam na mittai naanak har naam dhan nahee khattiaa |1|
lines.english: The karma of their past deeds cannot be erased, O Nanak, if they have not earned the wealth of the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਜਿ ਦਿਵਸ ਆਏ ਲਿਖੇ ਮਾਏ ਦੁਖੁ ਧਰਮ ਦੂਤਹ ਡਿਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: puj divas aae likhe maae dukh dharam dootah dditthiaa |
lines.english: When their pre-ordained days have run their course, O mother, they behold the Messengers of the Righteous Judge of Dharma, and they suffer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਹਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਅਸੰਖ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਆਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bharameh jon asankh mar janameh aavahee |
lines.english: He wanders around in countless incarnations; he dies, only to be born again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਨੇਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਗਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: audam kareh anek har naam na gaavahee |
lines.english: He makes all sorts of efforts, but he does not sing the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਜੁ ਬੋਵਸਿ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਗਹਿ ਕੀਆ ਅਪਣਾ ਪਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: beej bovas bhog bhogeh keea apanaa paave |
lines.english: As are the seeds he plants, so are the pleasures he enjoys; he receives the consequences of his own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੂ ਪੰਖੀ ਸੈਲ ਤਰਵਰ ਗਣਤ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: pasoo pankhee sail taravar ganat kachhoo na aave |
lines.english: As beasts, birds, stones and trees - their number cannot be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਾਰੰਤ ਜੂਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਆਪਿ ਨ ਭਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: ratan janam haarant jooai prabhoo aap na bhaavahee |
lines.english: He loses the jewel of this human life in the gamble, and God is not pleased with him at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਰਮਹਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਾਏ ਖਿਨੁ ਏਕੁ ਟਿਕਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak bharameh bhramaae khin ek ttikan na paavahee |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, wandering in doubt, he does not find any rest, even for an instant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਕੰਪਹਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਡੋਲ ਨੈਣ ਨ ਡੀਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kanpeh sir ddol nain na ddeetthiaa |
lines.english: The hands tremble, the head shakes, and the eyes do not see.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਬਨੁ ਗਇਆ ਬਿਤੀਤਿ ਜਰੁ ਮਲਿ ਬੈਠੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: joban geaa biteet jar mal baittheea |
lines.english: Youth has passed, and old age has taken its place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਨੈਣ ਦੀਸੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਜਨ ਈਸੈ ਛੋਡਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਚਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: neh nain deesai bin bhajan eesai chhodd maaeaa chaaliaa |
lines.english: The eyes do not see, without vibrating and meditating on the Lord; he must leave behind the attractions of Maya, and depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿਆ ਨ ਮਾਨਹਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਖਾਕੁ ਛਾਨਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਜਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahiaa na maaneh sir khaak chhaaneh jin sang man tan jaaliaa |
lines.english: He burnt his mind and body for his relatives, but now, they do not listen to him, and they throw dust on his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਮ ਰੰਗ ਅਪਾਰ ਪੂਰਨ ਨਹ ਨਿਮਖ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਵੂਠਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sreeraam rang apaar pooran neh nimakh man meh vootthiaa |
lines.english: Love for the infinite, Perfect Lord does not abide in his mind, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਣਾਇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal saranaae naanak aaeaa |
lines.english: Nanak has come to the Sanctuary of the Lord's lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੋਟਿ ਕਾਗਰ ਬਿਨਸ ਬਾਰ ਨ ਝੂਠਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak kott kaagar binas baar na jhootthiaa |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, the fort of paper is false - it is destroyed in an instant. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇ ਭਜੇ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਕਰਿ ਅੰਗੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhasange bhaje sreedhar kar ang prabh jee taariaa |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I vibrate and meditate on the Lord; God has made me His own, and saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤਰੁ ਭੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dutar bhai sansaar prabh aap taraaeaa |
lines.english: God Himself has carried Him across the impassable, terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮਾਨਿ ਲੀਏ ਨਾਮ ਦੀਏ ਅਵਰੁ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har maan lee naam dee avar kachh na beechaariaa |
lines.english: The Lord has approved of me, and blessed me with His Name; He did not take anything else into consideration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਅਪਾਰ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮਨਿ ਲੋੜੀਦਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan apaar tthaakur man lorreedaa paaeaa |
lines.english: I have found the infinite Lord and Master, the treasure of virtue, which my mind had yearned for.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਖਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sadaa tripate har naam bhojan khaaeaa |4|2|3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I am satisfied forever; I have eaten the food of the Lord's Name. ||4||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਵਾਰ ਸਲੋਕਾ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 vaar salokaa naal |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Vaar With Saloks:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਮਧਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਅੰਤਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: aad pooran madh pooran ant pooran paramesurah |
lines.english: In the beginning, He was pervading; in the middle, He is pervading; in the end, He will be pervading. He is the Transcendent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਸੰਤ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਰਮਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਘਨਾਸਨ ਜਗਦੀਸੁਰਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: simarant sant sarabatr ramanan naanak aghanaasan jagadeesurah |1|
lines.english: The Saints remember in meditation the all-pervading Lord God. O Nanak, He is the Destroyer of sins, the Lord of the universe. ||1||
